text: CareCalculus: The open-source, lightning-fast alternative to legacy medical calculators.
CareCalculus is an open-source medical calculator platform offering ultra-fast risk scores, drug conversions, and EHR SmartPhrase exports with an award-winning glassmorphic design.

CareCalculus is the modern alternative to MDCalc. Built by clinicians for clinicians, it provides an open-source, offline-first PWA experience for calculating medical risk scores (like SOFA, CHA2DS2-VASc) and drug dosages. It features built-in programmatic clinical guides and one-click EHR SmartPhrase exports to streamline shift handovers in the ER or ICU.
